x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces DOI's structured Open Data (evictions and marshal-revenue oversight, policy recommendations, performance indicators) and an index over its PDF-only public reports, and adds file_complaint — the net-new write workflow locked today inside the third-party Kaseware intake portal.

server.name: io.nyc.doi
server.title: NYC Department of Investigation (DOI)
server.description: Agent-native access to New York City's Inspector General — DOI public investigation reports and policy recommendations, City Marshal oversight (executed evictions and marshal revenue), and monthly performance indicators from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to file and track a fraud/waste/corruption complaint that today lives only in the third-party Kaseware intake portal.
server.instructions: Use find_reports to search DOI's public investigation reports (these are PDFs — results carry metadata and a pdfUrl, not structured findings). find_recommendations queries the Policy & Procedure Recommendations tracker (what DOI told agencies to fix and whether they did). find_evictions and find_marshal_revenue cover DOI's City Marshal oversight — evictions is DOI's most-viewed dataset. find_performance_indicators returns monthly operational metrics. file_complaint (net-new) reports fraud, waste, or corruption; it mutates state — confirm the allegation type, subject agency, and narrative with the user before submitting, support anonymous filing, and note that City employees have an Executive Order 16 obligation to report and may invoke Whistleblower Law protection.

tools.name: find_reports
tools.title: Find Reports
tools.description: Search DOI public investigation reports by year, type, subject agency, and/or free text. Reports are published as PDFs; results carry metadata and a pdfUrl.

tools.name: get_report
tools.title: Get Report
tools.description: Fetch a single DOI public report (title, release date, subject agency, unit, pdfUrl) by id.

tools.name: find_recommendations
tools.title: Find Recommendations
tools.description: Search DOI Policy & Procedure Recommendations by agency, acceptance status, implementation status, or free text.

tools.name: find_evictions
tools.title: Find Evictions
tools.description: Search executed City Marshal evictions by borough, residential/commercial, marshal, council district, or date range. DOI's most-viewed dataset.

tools.name: find_marshal_revenue
tools.title: Find Marshal Revenue
tools.description: List City Marshal annual fee, poundage, and net-income figures by marshal or year — DOI's financial oversight of the marshals it appoints.

tools.name: find_performance_indicators
tools.title: Find Performance Indicators
tools.description: List monthly DOI performance-management indicators (e.g. corruption lectures, customer-service measures) by indicator name or report month.

tools.name: list_my_complaints
tools.title: List My Complaints
tools.description: List the authenticated reporter's own fraud/waste/corruption complaints and their status — today visible only inside the Kaseware intake portal.

tools.name: file_complaint
tools.title: File a Corruption Complaint
tools.description: File a fraud/waste/corruption complaint with DOI. NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in the third-party Kaseware intake portal or a phone call. Mutates state — confirm the allegation type, subject agency, and narrative first; supports anonymous filing and Whistleblower Law protection. City employees have an Executive Order 16 obligation to report.
